title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: After abseiling into the forbidding Borneo jungle, Bear must descend treacherous cliffs, battle snakes and leeches and deal with torrential rain in order to survive.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: In the vastness of the Sahara desert and the terrifying beauty of towering sand dunes, Bear Grylls tackles extreme survival challenges as he consumes one of the world's deadliest scorpions to survive.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Deep in the heart of Vietnam, Bear Grylls encounters rocky terrain and faces deadly creatures as he journeys along a river.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: In Scotland's Cairngorm Mountains, adventurer Bear Grylls faces arctic blizzards, traps rabbits for food and uses a deer skin for shelter.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear Grylls travels to the freezing Arctic Circle and survives hunting a reindeer. He also crosses a frozen lake whilst protecting himself against deadly low temperatures.

title: Toddlers & Tiaras
subTitle: Glitz newbies Selena and Mackenzie face fierce Faithlyn at the Carolina Queens Pageant in Columbia, South Carolina. But who will impress the judges?

subTitle: When a strange man violently attempts to kidnap a woman's children, a 16-year-old wrestler comes to the rescue. Later, a scary car robbery takes place during broad daylight.

title: The Perfect Murder
subTitle: When Russel Douglas is found shot in the head in his car on a deserted road, it sparks a decade long case that leaves many with unanswered questions.

title: The Perfect Murder
subTitle: When Peggy Perez-Olivo is shot in the head, her husband Carlos insists they were victims of carjackers. However, the horror that follows will shock even experienced investigators.

title: Anaconda
subTitle: A snake hunter offers his assistance to a documentary crew attempting to film an indigenous tribe in the Amazon. But as the journey progresses, his presence forces them to veer into dangerous waters.

title: 10,000 B.C.
subTitle: D'Leh belongs to the tribe of hunters and gatherers who reside in the mountain range in the Urals. When his tribe is attacked, the love of his life is taken as prisoner and the men as slaves.

title: Bad Boys
subTitle: Marcus, a family man and Mike, a ladies' man, are partners in the Miami police department. Later, things get complicated when they assume each other's identity while investigating a drug deal.

title: Dolphin Tale 2
subTitle: Sawyer and Dr Clay Haskett embark on an ambitious mission to find a companion for Winter, a rescued bottlenose dolphin, after its sole companion and surrogate mother, Panama, dies.

title: Orphan
subTitle: After losing their baby, a couple adopt a nine-year-old girl. However, they soon make a troubling discovery about her mysterious past and uncover several traits of her disturbing personality.

subTitle: Tasked with a covert mission, Chan Ka-Kui hunts down an arms dealer, facing deadly traps, high-speed chases and gravity-defying stunts in his pursuit of justice.
